first_run_notes: This is the initial data load. No previous values exist for comparison. Change magnitude checks (Check 3) are skipped. Validation focuses on plausibility range checks (Check 2), cross-source consistency (Check 4), internal consistency (Check 5), and escalation criteria from event signals.

Pre-flagged anomaly from processing agent: Strait of Hormuz vessel traffic collapsed ~70% following US-Israel strikes on Iran; ~170 containerships trapped

event_escalations.description: US and Israel launch joint strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Khamenei [+10 related events]
event_escalations.investor_summary: US-Israeli strikes killed Supreme Leader Khamenei, Iran retaliated against Gulf states and US bases, Strait of Hormuz collapsed 70%, oil surged 13%, nuclear infrastructure targeted. Houthi Red Sea attacks resumed. This is the most consequential geopolitical event since Feb 2022 and affects global energy supply, shipping, defense equities, and risk premiums across the entire Middle East.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT all related events. Confidence is high (0.85-0.99) across multiple corroborating sources. Flag for continued monitoring — situation is rapidly evolving.

event_escalations.description: Pakistan declares 'open war' on Afghanistan with airstrikes on Kabul and Kandahar [+1 related events]
event_escalations.investor_summary: Pakistan declared open war on Afghanistan with airstrikes on Kabul and Kandahar. Active conflict status change for both countries. Affects regional stability, Pakistan sovereign risk, and South Asian investment flows.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. Confirmed by multiple sources with high confidence (0.93-0.98).

event_escalations.description: US Supreme Court strikes down IEEPA tariffs 6-3, ruling President lacks tariff authority
event_escalations.investor_summary: SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariffs 6-3; Trump immediately imposed 15% global tariff under Section 122. Fundamental restructuring of US trade policy legal framework. Affects all bilateral trade relationships and global supply chains.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. Supreme Court ruling is definitive (conf=0.99). Section 122 tariff implementation confirmed.

event_escalations.description: North Korea conducted its first ballistic missile test of 2026 on Jan 4, firing hypersonic missiles from Pyongyang striking a target 900km away. Believed to be Hwasong-16B solid-fueled IRBM capable of [+2 related events]
event_escalations.investor_summary: New START treaty expired without extension (US-Russia). North Korea tested hypersonic missiles. Russia planning new ICBM tests. Iran nuclear infrastructure targeted in strikes. The global nuclear order is in its most precarious state since the Cold War.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. New START expiry is confirmed. Missile tests reported by multiple defense sources.

event_escalations.description: Following the capture of Venezuelan President Maduro in January 2026, OFAC issued multiple general licenses easing Venezuela oil sanctions: GL 46A (Feb 10) authorizes broad US company activities in Ve [+2 related events]
event_escalations.investor_summary: Venezuela oil sanctions eased (OFAC general licenses post-Maduro capture). EU renewed Russia sanctions 6 months. Caesar Act for Syria repealed. Multiple comprehensive sanctions regime changes affecting energy markets and trade flows.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT. OFAC and EU Council actions are officially published.

event_escalations.description: Clashes erupted on Jan 29, 2026 between TPLF and Ethiopian government forces in the Tigray region. ENDF and Tigray Security Forces clashed near the Amhara border using drones, artillery, and heavy wea
event_escalations.investor_summary: TPLF-government clashes resumed in Tigray using drones and artillery. Threatens the 2022 Pretoria peace agreement. Affects Horn of Africa stability and humanitarian aid flows.
event_escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT with monitoring. Confidence 0.88 — situation is fluid.

summary.data_quality_assessment: HIGH — All 1,095 factor updates pass plausibility checks. Zero rejections. Two flagged anomalies are confirmed plausible (Libya GDP growth, Hormuz traffic collapse).
